title: Lucente 7PC Durable Everyday Clear Drinking Glass & Pitcher Jug Set - Set of 6 Weizen Style Beer Soft Drink Glasses 300ml & 1.8L 1.8 Litre Pitcher Style Jug.
features: A great value set highball tumbler drinking glasses ideal for everyday use.
Set of 6 stylish contemporary glasses with high quality clear clarity finish. Each glass holds 300ml / 0cl of liquid and measures 19cm in height and 6.5cm diameter.
This 6PC glass set is complimented with a durable bistro style glass pitcher jug with lid that holds 1.8 litre of liquid and measures 21cm in height x 14cm (Dia).
Suitable for domestic and commercial environments, this glassware set is great for water, juice, cocktails, beers or fizzy drinks.
All items are dishwasher, freezer and microwave safe.
description: Lucente 7PC Durable Everyday Clear Drinking Glass & Pitcher Jug Set - Set of 6 Weizen Style Beer Soft Drink Glasses 300ml & 1.8L 1.8 litre Pitcher style Jug. This 6PC glass set is complimented with a durable bistro style glass pitcher jug with lid that holds 1.8 litre of liquid and measures 21cm in height x 14cm (Dia). Suitable for domestic and commercial environments, this glassware set is great for water, juice, cocktails, beers or fizzy drinks. All items are dishwasher, freezer and microwave safe.
